feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BIC File for international bank master data migration
entry.content:
Hello,

where can we find BIC Database files for migration of international bank master data? We received a file for country specific banks in Germany. But where do we get the data for international banks in case that we do not have a SAP legacy system?

Thanks and best regards

Florian

entry.title: ZBV / CUA is not working as expected
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently having a strange issue with the CUA. Everything is working perfectly in our CUA system. We don't have duplicate company addresses, and users are assigned the correct one. Our Q-system is also working as expected. We are currently on S4/HANA 2023 SP 03/2025.

But here’s the problem: We’re currently having issues with our P-system. In this system, there are several users assigned to a different company; for example, the correct company address would be 41000 – Standard Company, and now we have about 90 addressesSAP with a new number and a new description -> 41001 – Standard Company0000012345, etc.

We have deleted or corrected these incorrect company addresses in the CUA system, the Dev system, and the Q system, but we cannot delete them in the P system. Do you have any idea how we can delete these incorrect entries? I tried using transaction SUCOMP, but it doesn’t work. I receive the following error message when I try to delete a company address, and the address we want to use is the default address:

And even if I assign a new company to the user, I still can't delete that incorrect company.
Sincerely, Dominik 🙂

entry.title: Where can I practice PFCG role maintenance hands-on in SAP Learning?
entry.content:
Hello,
I am learning SAP role maintenance and authorizations in PFCG and SU01 on SAP Learning. I want to practice exercises like copying SAP_BC_ENDUSER, creating custom roles, maintaining authorization object S_USER_GRP, generating profiles, and assigning roles to users.
Could anyone tell me where on the SAP Learning platform I can access a practice system or hands-on environment for this? If there is no live system, what is the recommended way to practice these exercises?
Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Maintenance Planner options for S/4HANA Upgrade
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
I'm currently preparing an SAP S/4HANA on-premise upgrade (from 2021 to 2023) and working with Maintenance Planner to generate the stack XML for SUM.
I would like to ask for which options should be selected during Maintenance Planner step Select OS/DB dependent files 

Here is my upgrade plan with Application OS is on Window and Database OS is on Linux ( I already upgrade the SAP HANA DB version and now i want to know the correct option to choose for the future SUM running)

And here are the options in  Maintenance Planner step Select OS/DB dependent files 

-------------

---------------

Thank you.

entry.title: Equivalence between classic extractors and CDS views
entry.content:
Hi all.
Why SAP hasn't publish a Note, document, whatever, that explain clear and concisely an equivalence between classic BW extractors and CDS views?
It´s a complete nosense to search through thousands of pages (notes, posts...), one by one extractor, if there is a CDS View that offers the same.
For example, consider 2LIS_02_ITM: SAP Note 2500202 tell us the extractor is "Whitelisted; DS working - no restrictions" (and no more information). However, we can find the C_PurchaseOrderItemDEX CDS View, that is "available for all external consumers who want to extract the data to SAP Business Warehouse (SAP BW) or other external systems.". So, can we replace 2LIS_02_ITM with C_PurchaseOrderItemDEX or not? Should we check field by field, join by join? What about a migration with cents of extractors?

Customers have invested tones of time and money developing and enhancing their ECC and BW sytems and deserves that.

entry.title: When executing FBL1N, the user data in the document header text field is not displayed
entry.content:
Hi SAP support,
When executing FBL1N  in Traditional Chinese mode, the user data in the document header text field is not displayed, but the user data can be displayed correctly after selecting the layout again.

There is no issue in English mode, the user data is displayed correctly when executing FBL1N.

 

Best Regards,

Sharlin

entry.title: Document type is auto defaulted after performing an asset transaction before
entry.content: After performing AUC settlement and trying to perform a transfer of asset within company code afterward, the document type is auto defaulted to the previously performed transaction ie AU(AUC settlement). Is there a way to not have this field auto defaulted specific to asset related transactions?

entry.title: QCM Tables in S4HANA
entry.content:
It has been recommended as per the TPO report by SAP to remove the QCM tables

QCMYYSD0022

QCM/SAPLOM/MEH_

QCMYYLE0035

QCMYYLE0018

QCMYYSD0134

Can we remove these tables directly or we need to check any dependency.

How can we check if there is any dependency to be checked before removing this table.

entry.title: new program for Abap use in confirmation and batch to batch consumption
entry.content: abap table for SAP PP/QM Module for prod order confirmation and batch to batch consumption use in 101, 261 movement instead 309 movement use in background job single phase mat to mat transfer automatic process and manually process?

entry.title: NPS Wage Type (/3FS) Not Posting to Both Debit and Credit in FI Integration
entry.content:
Hello All, 

We have a requirement wherein the NPS contribution wage type /3FS should be posted to both Debit (Expense GL) and Credit (Liability GL) during FI posting.

However, currently the system is posting the amount only to the Credit side (₹21,000) under the liability account. No corresponding Debit (expense) entry is being generated.

Observations:

  • The FI document is balanced (total debit = total credit).
  • No errors are encountered during posting (via PC00_M99_CIPE).
  • The posting run is completed successfully.
  • Wage type /3FS is processed in payroll but only reflected on the credit side in FI.

Expected Result:

  • Wage type /3FS should generate:
    • Debit Entry → Expense GL (Employer Contribution / NPS Expense)
    • Credit Entry → Liability GL (NPS Payable)

Request:
Kindly guide on the required configuration changes to achieve the above requirement.
Best Regards
Nitin

entry.title: Amount in Local currency is 0 in BAPI_GOODSMVT_ITEMS
entry.content: In BAPI_GOODSMVT_ITEMS , Amount in local currency field is reflecting while giving the inputs like Material document & year. Will attach the screenshot for your reference.

entry.title: Standard SAP MB5S throwing TIME OUT ERROR
entry.content:
Hello Community,

In recent times while executing MB5S t-code it is in buffering mode after standard interrupt time of system it is throwing ABAP run time TIME OUT error.  

Can I make it background job as it is a standard t-code or need to ask basis team to increase interrupt time.

Please suggest or provide useful info regarding this scenario.

entry.title: Advanced Returns Management (CBAR) and Quantity Contracts
entry.content:
Hi all, I’d appreciate your input on the following issue.

We have process where the flow is:
1. Quantity Contract > Sales Order > Delivery > Invoice (F2)
2. The customer was invoiced too high a price, so we create a CBAR with reference to the F2 document for a value correction only, using:

  • Return Reason: Customer invoiced too much
  • Follow-Up Activity: Material Remains at Customer Site
  • Refund Type: Credit Memo
  • Refund Control: Refund Allowed

3. We then create a Debit Memo Request (type DR) with reference to the F2 document for the correct price the customer actually owes.

Issue: When the sales order is created with reference to the quantity contract, the contract quantity is consumed correctly. However, once the CBAR is created with reference to the billing document, the contract quantity is reopened. This happens even though there is no physical return and the material remains at the customer site.

The later debit memo process does not consume the quantity again, so the contract open quantity becomes incorrect. From a business perspective, this is problematic because the goods were still sold; only the price was corrected.

Findings: Our current assumption is that SAP treats the CBAR as returns-relevant because item category RENV is configured as a returns item. This seems similar to SAP Note 3604002, where SAP confirms that a return order created for a sales order referencing a quantity contract reopens the contract quantity. However, it is unclear whether SAP also intends this behavior for ARM CBAR scenarios that are value-only.

Tests: Initial tests showed that the contract quantity is already affected at CBAR creation.
The SDF / free-of-charge follow-on flow does not seem to be the trigger, which aligns with SAP Note 3666149.

We also tested removing the “Sched. Line Allowed” indicator (based on SAP Note 610629), but then the quantity was no longer registered properly and a complete CBAR could not be created. The change was reverted.
This suggests that simply removing schedule line relevance is not a viable solution for RENV.

Main question: Is it standard SAP behaviour that a value-only CBAR reopens quantity contract quantities, or is this just a side effect of the returns item category/document flow design?

Open points/We are mainly trying to understand:

  • Should a value-only CBAR affect a quantity contract at all?
  • Does SAP Note 3604002 also apply to ARM/CBAR, or only to classic return orders?
  • Is there any SAP-supported way to keep ARM standard behavior, but prevent contract quantity reopening in value-only cases?
  • If not, should price corrections for quantity-contract sales be handled with a different process?

Any input would be greatly appreciated.
If you need more detailed information, I've created this blog post as well: Questions: Relationship between CBAR (Accelerated Return) and Quantity Contracts in S/4HANA

entry.title: Global Hierarchy - Unable to load attributes on the node of the Global Hierarchy in SAP
entry.content:
We have a created a Custom Hierarchy type to maitain Investment classification Hierarchy. At the leaf we have attribute assigned which allows multiple values. 

Problem -

When we export this hierarchy Attributes with multiple values are not downloaded

When we import. Only nodes/leaf are uploaded., attributes are not uploaded

Can attributes with multiple values are allowed for import?

entry.title: ISO20022: Format switch from pain.001.001.03 to pain.001.001.09
entry.content:
As part of a migration to ISO 20022 (pain.001.001.09) in SAP (PMW/DMEE), we need to gradually switch existing payments to the new format.

Currently each company code uses about 10 Payment Methods which are actively used in F110.

We have old DMEE tree for pain.001.001.03 and we have a new one for pain.001.001.09.

The challenge is how to perform the switch:

  • Creating new (duplicated) Payment Methods with the new format is not very practical (a lot of configuration, changes in master data, and the Payment Method key is only 1 character).
  • Simply replacing the payment format in an existing Payment Method is risky because it would immediately affect all payments using that method.

What is the usual way to perform a phased and safe rollout of a new payment format in production?

Will be appreciated for ideas or real exampes.

entry.title: Need help on SAP system Administration Courses in SAP Learning Hub
entry.content: I want to learn SAP system Administration i.e Basis role. Pls suggest relevant courses from SAP learning hub. I have already completed SAP HANA DBA course and now want to focus on core SAP Basis Admin activities. Thank You.

entry.title: Cant we configure delete stock identification , remove only delete identification on storage type
entry.content:
Can't we configure delete stock identification, remove only delete identification on storage type.

its troughing error it allowing only final storage type.

Kindly help me to assist for this issue

Thanks and Regards,

Anjanna

entry.title: RC 12 Error during Client Import to MXQ 500 / QAS 500 (Reopened)
entry.content: Continuing: How to run CHECK_TABLE_CONSISTENCY in SAP HANA Studio

entry.title: Problem with the views of F2343 Manage Inspection Lots
entry.content:
At the operational level, views were created to facilitate their searches;

Then the operator enters a control batch to input the data.

Once finished, the operator returns to the home screen to process a second control batch. The user-created view does not apply.

entry.title: What business trend is currently having the biggest impact on your SAP projects?
entry.content: I feel like there’s always a new “big thing” everyone is talking about, lately it has been AI, clean core, cloud, UX… but I’m not sure all of them actually change what we do day to day. I wanted to ask if you really see a difference in your projects with all these trends. I mean, is there something that really made a difference?  Something that actually changed how you work, not just something that sounds good in presentations.
